title: PokeCafe Oficial
description: Pixelmon Server with a lot of competitive focus and deep experience
body:
This is the official modpack of PokeCafé. PokeCafé is a spanish pixelmon server with a large community around the spanish speakers.

This modpack includes Pixelmon and a lot of extra things for performance and information:
It includes a minimap, JEI, oculus to load shaders, rubidium for performance and a texturepack for better overview.
You still have to install the official texturepack from our discord!

All these mods will give to your experience a beautiful view from the shaders whithout loosing performance. The UI (minecraft interface) is also changed for a better experience.
You also have one shader that mix good with the server (Pastel) and other shaders that you can choose to change.

¡It's all ready to play! Just remember to add our texturepack.
Minecraft IP: mc.pokecafe.net
